LanguageData.Aq_NeedsOceanWater: Needs to be placed on ocean water.
LanguageData.GolemAwoken_Notification: A {0} has been magically compelled to life! It has been named {1} and will now serve the colony.
LanguageData.GolemIconDesc: Invoke the telluric power from a tome of golems. Awake the statue into a {0} to serve the colony.
LanguageData.NoEligiblePawns: No colonists meet the required intellectual skill level
LanguageData.Aq_EjectIngredientsDesc: Eject all stored ingredients onto the ground near the building.
LanguageData.AC_BeautyMattersToggleDesc: When enabled, pawn beauty affects social stats, relations, and thoughts. Disable to revert to vanilla beauty behaviour.
LanguageData.AC_BodyTypeMattersToggleDesc: When enabled, a pawn's body type (hulk, fat, thin) applies stat modifiers. Disable to revert to vanilla behaviour.
LanguageData.AC_XenotypeBlacklistHeader: Excluded xenotypes (these will not receive body type modifiers):
